Bash("D:/Software/Anaconda/envs/pytorch_cuda121/python.exe" -c "import torch; checkpoint = torch.load\(''best_model_v3.pt'', map_location=''cpu''\); print\(''=== best_model_v3.pt 详细信息 ===\\n''\); print\(f''Epoch: {checkpoint[""epoch""] + 1}''\); print\(f''Loss: {checkpoint[""loss""]:.4f}''\); print\(f''Accuracy: {checkpoint[""acc""]*100:.2f}%''\); print\(f''F1-Macro: {checkpoint[""f1_macro""]*100:.2f}%''\); print\(f''F1-Weighted: {checkpoint[""f1_weighted""]*100:.2f}%''\); print\(''\\n各类别F1分数:''\); classes = [''General'', ''Excellent'', ''Good'', ''Poor'']; [print\(f''  {classes[i]}: {checkpoint[""f1_per_class""][i]*100:.2f}%''\) for i in range\(len\(checkpoint[''f1_per_class'']\)\)]; print\(''\\n模型参数统计:''\); total_params = sum\(p.numel\(\) for p in checkpoint[''model_state_dict''].values\(\)\); print\(f''  总参数量: {total_params:,}''\); print\(f''  参数块数量: {len\(checkpoint[""model_state_dict""]\)}''\)")
